extraction.one_line_summary: BOZZANA Filippo won from breakaway on veneto roads while ROGLIČ Primož attacked final climb to move second overall past ALMEIDA João
tactical_patterns: ROGLIČ attacked final climb while THOMAS remained metronomic, exploiting VINE's descent mistake to gain crucial seconds for second overall.
INEOS pulled valley before climbs allowing breakaway six minutes, then abandoned THOMAS completely on penultimate climb revealing weak domestique depth.
HEALY attacked flat veneto roads early attempting KOM defense, went backwards immediately showing mountain jersey holders can't burn matches pre-climbs.
BOZZANA and ZANA split Israel Premier Tech forcing FRIGO chase, demonstrating breakaway teammates creating tactical dilemmas even within escaped groups.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: attacked final climb after lingering suspiciously at back earlier, moving second overall demonstrates tactical sandbagging worked
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: remained isolated but unfazed when teammates disappeared, birthday consistency suggests unflappable but no offensive capacity remains
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: negative: dropped to third by conserving energy while ROGLIČ attacked, defensive tactics backfired losing 11 seconds and second place
rider_signals.DUNBAR Eddie: positive: stayed with leaders longer than expected, moved up GC despite losing time showing unexpected climbing resilience
rider_signals.VINE Jay: negative: descent mistake cost THOMAS crucial domestique support at worst moment, technical errors matter more than engine late-race
rider_signals.HEALY Ben: negative: early attack on flat roads before climbs backfired completely, lost blue jersey to PINOT showing poor energy management
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: took KOM jersey despite second place finish, breakaway sprint consistency reveals renewed form late career
